scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @trackx/api-core build && pnpm --filter @trackx/parser-core build && next dev --port 3000
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @trackx/api-core build && pnpm --filter @trackx/parser-core build && pnpm --filter @trackx/shared build && next build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @trackx/api-core build && pnpm --filter @trackx/parser-core build && pnpm --filter @trackx/shared build && tsc --noEmit
